- xunit: 2.9.3

All files are updated. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Centralized in `Directory.Build.props`** — all versions now defined as MSBuild properties in one place:

| Package | Old | New |
|---------|-----|-----|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 | **10.0.7** |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 | **12.27.0** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | **10.0.7** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | **10.0.7** |
| AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.26** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | **1.15.3** |

**Key changes:**
- Eliminated all hardcoded versions from `.csproj` files — everything now uses `$(PropertyName)` references
- `Common.props` also uses the centralized `$(LoggingVersion)` property
- TFM-conditional packages (NewtonsoftJson) retain their per-framework pattern but use properties
- To bump any package in the future, just edit the single property in `Directory.Build.props`
